scripts.poke-pi:progress:forever: sh -c 'mkdir -p runs; port=${PORT:-3030}; iterations=${ITERATIONS:-1000000}; max_steps=${MAX_STEPS:-120}; poll_ms=${POLL_MS:-1000}; llm_every=${LLM_EVERY:-4}; run_prefix=${RUN_ID_PREFIX:-continuous}; npm run poke -- status || { echo "poke-pi:progress:forever preflight failed; start mGBA, load the ROM, run mGBASocketServer.lua, and verify MGBA_HTTP_BASE_URL" >&2; exit 1; }; tsx src/index.ts critic --iterations "$iterations" --poll-ms "$poll_ms" --port "$port" > runs/.movement-monitor-forever.log 2>&1 & monitor=$!; trap "kill $monitor 2>/dev/null || true" INT TERM EXIT; npm run poke-pi:progress -- --iterations "$iterations" --max-steps "$max_steps" --poll-ms "$poll_ms" --llm-every "$llm_every" --run-id-prefix "$run_prefix" --port "$port"'
